LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Generic_M: Oh, it's so nice to see you today, dear! Make sure you take a break and smell the flowers, won't you? It's good for the soul.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Generic_T: I was just thinking about baking some of my special cookies. George always complains about the kitchen getting too warm, but he's the first one to ask for a warm batch!
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Generic_W: Hello there, young one! The flowers in the town square are doing wonderfully today. I hope the crops on your farm are thriving just as much.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Generic_T: My poor George has been a little more sour than usual today. Don't take it to heart if he barks at you, dear... he really does appreciate your visits.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Generic_F: Granny's bones always ache a bit more when the weather is about to turn. Make sure you dress warmly if you're going to be out late, won't you?
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Generic_S: It's so wonderful to see the town looking lively today. Oh, and don't forget to eat a hearty meal, honey! Farming is hard work.
Sundays are always so peaceful. I just finished writing a little letter to an old friend. Make sure you keep in touch with your loved ones, dear.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Spring_Mo: Spring is my absolute favorite season, dear. New life is blooming everywhere you look!
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Summer_Tu: Oh, it's getting dreadfully hot out there! Make sure you drink plenty of water, young one. You don't want to overwork yourself in this heat.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Fall_Wed: The leaves are changing beautifully this year. I've been pressing a few of the prettiest ones in my books.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Winter_Th: Brrr! It's so chilly! I hope you have a nice, warm hearth to return to on the farm, dear.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Mon4: Mondays always feel like a fresh start, don't they? I hope your week is off to a beautiful beginning, dear.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Tue2: I've been thinking about trying a new cookie recipe, but George is quite set in his ways. Perhaps I'll make a small batch just for myself... and you!
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Wed6: Halfway through the week already! Goodness, time flies when you're busy in the garden.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Thu2: Have you seen my reading glasses, young one? Oh, wait... they're on my head. How silly of Granny!
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Fri4: The weekend is almost here! Though I suppose on a farm, the work never truly stops, does it?
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Fri8: It's a lovely Friday afternoon. I'm just enjoying the peace and quiet before the town gets rowdy tonight.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Sat2: I love Saturdays. I get to see so many of the townsfolk out and about.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Sat6: Make sure you rest this weekend if you can, honey. Even the hardest worker needs a day off.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Sun2: A quiet Sunday morning is just the thing for an old woman like me. It's so peaceful.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Sun6: Are you ready for the week ahead, dear? Just take it one day at a time.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Spring_Tu: The spring rain is wonderful for my tulips, but do make sure you don't catch a cold out there!
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Spring_Th: Look at all this new life around us. Spring is truly Yoba's gift to the valley.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Spring_Sa: I'm hoping to see a little more sunshine this weekend, but the plants won't mind the rain.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Summer9: Oh my, the heat is certainly picking up. Stop by if you ever need a cool glass of water, dear.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Summer10: George is so fussy when it's hot out. I've had to make extra trips to fetch him ice for his drinks!
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Summer11: The summer evenings are so beautiful, aren't they? The fireflies remind me of when I was a little girl.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Fall14: The crisp air is so refreshing! Fall has always been a special time for George and me.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Fall9: I'll be starting on my holiday knitting soon. I like to get a head start!
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Fall10: The fall harvest must keep you so busy, young one. Make sure you're eating enough of it!
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Winter11: Brrr! The old bones don't much like the cold, but the snow is very pretty from the window.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Winter13: George and I haven't been out much this week. The ice is just too dangerous for his chair.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Winter9: I put a little extra wood in the stove this morning. Nothing beats a warm fire on a snowy weekend.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Spring10: Spring is in the air now! My garden is finally waking from its winter sleep.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Winter14: Ah, the 14th! Time goes by so quickly... Make sure you appreciate every moment.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Spring21: Tomorrow is George's clinic appointment. He always gets so grumpy about going to see Doctor Harvey.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Spring28: The last day of Spring! Make sure your fields are cleared out for Summer, young one.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Summer3: It's so humid already. Be careful not to work out in the sun too long.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Summer16: The midpoint of summer... The days are so long and bright, but they pass by in a flash.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Summer25: Oh, it's almost Fall. The town will be changing colors before we know it.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Fall4: The leaves are really starting to turn now. Such beautiful shades of red and gold!
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Fall12: I should ask George to help me pick some apples. Oh, but his knees... maybe I'll ask Alex instead.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Fall19: We're nearing the end of another year. Have you achieved what you set out to do, dear?
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Fall24: It's George's birthday today! I made him some fried mushrooms, his favorite.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Winter3: The first few days of winter always feel so quiet and still.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Winter12: The town is so festive this time of year! It always brings a smile to my face.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Winter18: Almost my birthday... though at my age, you stop wanting to count them!
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Winter26: The year is winding down. Rest up, dear, for another spring is just around the corner.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Spring5: Oh, the spring breeze is so refreshing today! It's the perfect weather for a stroll in the garden, don't you think?
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Spring14: Fourteen days of spring already... The season is just flying by! I've been busy tidying up the flower beds in the square.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDialogue_Spring22: The flowers are in full bloom now, dear. It makes my old heart so happy to see all this color in the valley.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Mon2: It's Monday again. Bah. Just another day of staring at this screen.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Tue2: Hmmph. Evelyn is baking again. The whole house smells like sugar... I'm not complaining, though.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Wed4: You look like you've been working hard. Hmm. Nothing wrong with breaking a sweat.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Thu4: Don't stand in front of the television set. The Tunnelers are on in five minutes!
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Fri2: Hmph. The town always gets so noisy on Fridays. I prefer it quiet.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Sat4: Alex is out throwing that ball around again. Kid's got energy, I'll give him that.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Sat8: I used to hate the weekends... Too many people around. But I don't mind when you drop by, kid.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Sun2: Sundays are for resting. Though I've been resting for years now... Hmph.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Sun6: I complained to Evelyn about the draft in here, and she just handed me a sweater. Bah.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Mon8: You're a reliable one, you know that? We don't get many hard workers like you around here anymore.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Spring4: Spring is wet. Wet means my knees act up. Why do people like this season again?
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Spring8: Look at all this mud everywhere... Hope you wiped your shoes before coming in.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Spring12: Evelyn is driving me crazy with her flower talk... Hmmph. Though I suppose they do smell nice.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Spring16: Bah! The TV signal is acting up again. Just my luck.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Summer7: It's too hot today. The air in this valley gets thicker than chowder.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Summer13: Hmmph. Someone sent me a letter about a new brand of television. Sounds like a scam to me.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Summer19: I told Alex to drink more water out there. Kids these days don't listen to a lick of sense.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Summer24: The summer's almost over... Good riddance. The heat is unbearable.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Fall6: Fall is the only season I can tolerate. The air is crisp... Reminds me of the old days.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Fall14: Hmm... I can smell Evelyn cooking something. Smells like mushrooms. Don't tell her I said that.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Fall17: I saw the Mayor earlier today. Hmph. He talks too much.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Fall27: Tomorrow is the start of winter... Make sure you've got enough wood for your fire, kid.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Winter4: My legs feel like icicles today. *Grumble*... It's miserable.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Winter8: When I was younger, I used to shovel the snow for the whole block. Now... well... hmph.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Winter15: Bah! Everyone's running around talking about the Feast. I'd rather just watch my shows in peace.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Winter19: Tomorrow is my wife's birthday. I got her something small... She better appreciate it.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Winter22: I might be a grouch, but even I can appreciate a hot bowl of soup on a day like this.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Winter25: Hmph... You really don't have anywhere better to be right now? Go enjoy the holiday, kid.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Winter28: Another year gone... They fly by faster the older you get. Don't waste 'em.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Spring3: I heard you've been planting parsnips. Hmph. A sturdy crop, if you don't overwater it.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Spring18: If you find any leeks out there, you know who to bring 'em to. Just sayin'.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Spring21: Bah! Tomorrow is that clinic appointment. Harvey doesn't know a thing about a bad knee.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Spring27: The TV said there's going to be a good documentary on later tonight about mining. Hmph, maybe I'll learn something.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Summer5: I used to be quite the swimmer in my youth. Hard to believe now, isn't it? Hmph.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Summer22: A farmer's work is never done... At least that's what my grand-pap used to say.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Fall3: Did you harvest any pumpkins yet? Evelyn wants to make a pie, and I wouldn't mind a slice.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Fall21: Hmph. I thought I saw a ghost outside my window last night... Probably just my old eyes playing tricks.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Fall23: It's my birthday tomorrow. Don't think I'm making a big fuss about it... Bah.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeDialogue_Fall25: Ah, another year older. My joints feel it the most. Hmph.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynTulipQuestLetter: Hello dear,^^I was just looking around the living room and realized it could use a little splash of color.^^If you happen to grow any Tulips on your farm, could you bring one to an old lady? It would bring such joy to my heart.^^- Evelyn^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynTulipQuest%%[#]Letter from Evelyn
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynTulipQuest: ItemDelivery/Tulip Season/Evelyn would like a fresh Tulip to brighten up her living room./Bring Evelyn 1 Tulip./Evelyn (O)591 1/-1/100/-1/true/Oh, what a beautiful tulip! The color is just lovely.#$b#Thank you so much for bringing this to me, dear.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynFairyRoseQuestLett: My dear,^^I was hoping to press some Fairy Roses for my albums this year. If you could harvest some and bring me one of them, I'd be incredibly grateful.^^- Evelyn^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynFairyRoseQuest%%[#]Letter from Evelyn
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynFairyRoseQuest: ItemDelivery/Rose Pressing/Evelyn would like to press some Fairy Roses for her albums and is asking for one./Bring Evelyn 1 Fairy Rose./Evelyn (O)595 1/-1/1500/-1/true/Oh, this is simply gorgeous! The petals are so delicate.#$b#I'll get to pressing these right away. Thank you, dear!$l
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynChocolateCakeQuest: Hello dear,^^I was just thinking about how much George and I love a good Chocolate Cake, but I haven't had the energy to bake one lately.^^If you happen to have one, could you bring it by? We would love to split it and share a nice treat.^^- Evelyn^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynChocolateCakeQuest%%[#]Letter from Evelyn

ItemDelivery/Sweet Treat/Evelyn would like a Chocolate Cake to share with George./Bring Evelyn 1 Chocolate Cake./Evelyn (O)220 1/-1/500/-1/true/Oh, my! It smells absolutely delicious.#$b#George will be so thrilled to share this with me. Thank you for the wonderful treat!$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeFreshLeekQuestLett: Hey kid,^^Do me a favor. I've been craving a good, crisp Leek from the mountains.^^If you're out foraging and find one, bring it by. I don't get out as much as I used to.^^- George^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeFreshLeekQuest%%[#]Letter from George
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeFreshLeekQuest: ItemDelivery/Spring Craving/George is craving a fresh Leek from the mountains./Bring George 1 Leek./George (O)20 1/-1/200/-1/true/Bah, it took you long enough. Joking... it looks like a good one. Thanks, kid.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeStoneQuestLetter: Kid,^^The winds are picking up and there's a draft in the house that's driving me crazy.^^I need to patch a hole in the foundation. Bring me 50 pieces of Stone if you have any to spare.^^- George^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeStoneQuest%%[#]Letter from George
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeStoneQuest: ItemDelivery/Fixing the Draft/George needs Stone to fix a drafty spot in his house./Bring George 1 Stone./George (O)390 1/-1/100/-1/true/Good, this should do the trick. Now maybe my knees will stop freezing.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeFriedMushroomQuest: Kid,^^I can smell Evelyn cooking, but she won't make one of my favorites.^^If you happen to get your hands on a Fried Mushroom, bring it to me on the sly. Don't tell my wife.^^- George^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeFriedMushroomQuest%%[#]Letter from George

ItemDelivery/Secret Snack/George wants a Fried Mushroom and doesn't want Evelyn to know./Bring George 1 Fried Mushroom./George (O)205 1/-1/500/-1/true/Hmph. Not as good as the ones Evelyn used to make, but it'll do. Thanks.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynCuteLetter1: Oh my dear,^^I was just baking a fresh batch of cookies. I hope you're taking good care of yourself out on that farm! Make sure you find time to rest.^^- Evelyn^^%item object 223 3 %%[#]Note from Evelyn
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynCuteLetter2: Dearest,^^The rain outside always makes my old joints ache, but I know it's wonderful for the gardens! I had an extra slice of cake left over and wanted to share it with my favorite neighbor.^^- Evelyn^^%item object 221 1 %%[#]Note from Evelyn
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeCuteLetter1: Evelyn made me write this. She said we haven't seen you around as much lately. Don't go thinking I actually miss you, but... if you're ever in the neighborhood, I guess you could drop by. Keep your chimney lit, it's freezing out there.^^- George^^%item object 382 5 %%[#]Note from George
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynFreshCrocusQuestLe: Dearest,^^I was sitting by the fire today, thinking about when George and I were first courting. He used to brave the cold to bring me a wild Crocus.^^If you happen to find one out in the snow, could you bring it to me? I'd simply love to see those gentle petals again.^^- Evelyn^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynFreshCrocusQuest%%[#]Letter from Evelyn
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynFreshCrocusQuest: ItemDelivery/Winter Memory/Evelyn is remembering her youth and would like a wild Crocus./Bring Evelyn 1 Crocus./Evelyn (O)418 1/-1/300/-1/true/Oh, my... it's just as beautiful as I remember.#$b#Thank you, dear. You've made an old woman very happy today.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynSugarQuestLetter: Hello honey,^^Granny was right in the middle of making a big batch of cookies for Vincent and Jas, and silly me! I completely ran out of Sugar.^^If you have a spare bag, could you bring it over? I know the little ones are looking forward to their treats.^^- Evelyn^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynSugarQuest%%[#]Letter from Evelyn
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynSugarQuest: ItemDelivery/Baking Emergency/Evelyn ran out of Sugar while baking cookies for the town's children./Bring Evelyn 1 Sugar./Evelyn (O)245 1/-1/200/-1/true/Oh, you're a lifesaver, dear!#$b#I can finish these up before they come over.#$b#I'll be sure to save a cookie just for you!$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynClothQuestLetter: My dear,^^I was looking at George's favorite sweater this morning and realized it's getting quite threadbare. I'd love to make him a new one.^^If you have some nice, spun Cloth from your farm, could you bring some by?^^- Evelyn^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynClothQuest%%[#]Letter from Evelyn
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynClothQuest: ItemDelivery/Warm Sweater/Evelyn wants to knit a new sweater for George and needs some Cloth./Bring Evelyn 1 Cloth./Evelyn (O)428 1/-1/600/-1/true/This fabric is wonderfully soft! George will be so snug in his new sweater.#$b#You have such a kind heart, helping me take care of him.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynMelonQuestLetter: Farmer! We have a bit of a situation at the house.^^Alex invited over some friends for our family dinner this weekend and forgot to tell me until just now! I don't have enough food.^^Could you bring me one Melon as soon as possible? I need to make a massive fruit salad to feed all these hungry kids.^^- Evelyn^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynMelonQuest%%[#]Letter from Evelyn
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynMelonQuest: ItemDelivery/Family Gathering/Evelyn needs one Melon to make a big fruit salad for a family gathering./Bring Evelyn 1 Melon./Evelyn (O)254 1/-1/400/-1/true/Oh, thank goodness you arrived when you did!#$b#I can finally start chopping these up.#$b#You really saved my evening, dear.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgePaleAleQuestLetter: Don't say a word of this to Evelyn.^^I want a Pale Ale. I haven't had one since I sat on the porch with my old man, years before he passed away. I just... I want to remember what it tasted like. Bring me one when you have the time.^^- George^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgePaleAleQuest%%[#]Letter from George
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgePaleAleQuest: ItemDelivery/Drink for Dad/George wants a Pale Ale to remember his late father./Bring George 1 Pale Ale./George (O)303 1/-1/600/-1/true/...Yeah, that's exactly how I remember it.#$b#Thanks, kid. Seriously.#$b#Now let me drink this in peace.$l
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeWineQuestLetter: This wind is loud enough to wake the dead. It's rattling the old window panes. I can't stand it.^^Bring me a bottle of Wine so I can actually get some sleep through this racket. Evelyn's already out like a light, so just hand it over quietly.^^- George^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeWineQuest%%[#]Letter from George
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeWineQuest: ItemDelivery/Sleeping Through the Storm/George wants some Wine to help him sleep through the loud, windy weather./Bring George 1 Wine./George (O)348 1/-1/800/-1/true/Finally. Took you long enough.#$b#Maybe I can actually get some shut-eye. Goodnight.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDiamondQuestLetter: Young one, are you awake? I had a terrible fright last night.^^I was cleaning out the old dresser and knocked my jewelry box onto the floor. The little diamond from my mother's brooch popped out and went straight down the floorboard... I've been crying over it all morning.^^Could you find a Diamond for me to replace it? I'm terribly heartbroken.^^- Evelyn^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDiamondQuest%%[#]Letter from Evelyn
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynDiamondQuest: ItemDelivery/Broken Brooch/Evelyn lost the diamond from her mother's brooch and needs a replacement./Bring Evelyn 1 Diamond./Evelyn (O)72 1/-1/1000/-1/true/Oh, bless your soul! This is the right size.#$b#I can't thank you enough, dear.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeIridiumQuestLetter: They don't make parts like they used to. The left wheel on this chair has been squeaking for weeks.^^I read in an engineering magazine that iridium doesn't rust or warp under pressure. If you ever manage to smelt an Iridium Bar, bring it to me. I want to see if I can swap out these axles before I go deaf.^^- George^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeIridiumQuest%%[#]Letter from George
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeIridiumQuest: ItemDelivery/Squeaky Wheel/George's wheelchair is squeaking and he wants an Iridium Bar to fix the axles./Bring George 1 Iridium Bar./George (O)337 1/-1/1000/-1/true/Well, look at that. Heavy and solid!#$b#This just might work.#$b#Don't think I'm not grateful, kid. I am.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynChickenStatueQuest: Hello my dear,^^I find myself feeling quite nostalgic today. I was telling George about my childhood home, and he reminded me of that sweet, sweet little Chicken Statue my mother kept on the mantlepiece.^^If you ever unearth one in your travels, I would dearly love to have it to remember her by.^^- Evelyn^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynChickenStatueQuest%%[#]Letter from Evelyn

ItemDelivery/Mother's Memory/Evelyn would like a Chicken Statue for her mantle, like the one her mother used to have./Bring Evelyn 1 Chicken Statue./Evelyn (O)113 1/-1/500/-1/true/Oh my words, you actually found one! It looks exactly like my mother's.#$b#I'm going to put it on the mantle right away. Thank you, dear.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeOrnamentalFanQuest: I have a massive favor to ask, and it stays between us.^^Evelyn has been putting up with my complaints and taking care of me for more years than I can count. I want to give her something nice for a change.^^There's an old Ornamental Fan you can find buried out there. Bring one to me so I can give it to her.^^- George^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeOrnamentalFanQuest%%[#]Letter from George

ItemDelivery/Gift for Evelyn/George wants an Ornamental Fan to give to Evelyn to thank her for everything she does./Bring George 1 Ornamental Fan./George (O)106 1/-1/500/-1/true/You actually brought it. It's beautiful.#$b#Evelyn is going to be so happy when she sees this.#$b#Thanks, kid. You're alright.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynGiftLetterSunnySum: The summer sun is shining so beautifully today! I was watching the butterflies in the garden, they're so cute!^^Please, make sure you're eating properly, and enjoying life here in the valley.^^I baked a Pink Cake yesterday and saved a slice just for you!^^- Evelyn^^%item object 221 1 %%[#]Letter from Evelyn
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynGiftLetterSnowyWin: It's bitter cold outside! The snow is piling up on the window sills, and it makes my joints ache just looking at it.^^I spent the afternoon baking and wanted to send you a batch of warm cookies to eat!^^- Evelyn^^%item object 223 3 %%[#]Letter from Evelyn
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeGiftLetterRainyFal: The damp air is killing my knees today. I didn't feel like watching TV, so I just sat by the window, and I saw you run by in the rain earlier. You're going to catch your death working like a madman in this weather.^^Drink this coffee and stay inside for once.^^- George^^%item object 433 2 %%[#]Letter from George
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgePearlQuestLetter: Our anniversary is coming up. I want to give Evelyn something special. Decades ago, we took a ferry to the Fern Islands and the water was clear and full of pearls, and she loved it.^^I don't have the legs to make it there anymore. If you find a Pearl out there, bring it to me. I want to remind her of that trip.^^- George^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgePearlQuest%%[#]Letter from George
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgePearlQuest: ItemDelivery/Our Anniversary/George wants to surprise Evelyn for their anniversary with a Pearl, reminding her of a trip they took to the Fern Islands./Bring George 1 Pearl./George (O)797 1/-1/2000/-1/true/You actually found one. It looks just like the ones we saw back then.#$b#She's going to love this. Thank you, kid.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynAncientFruitQuestL: My dear,^^I found my grandmother's recipe book, and saw a jam she used to make when we were kids. It was made from a blue, ancient fruit of some kind.^^It sparked such a memory... if you find an Ancient Fruit, could you bring it to me? I would love to taste that old recipe, just one last time.^^- Evelyn^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynAncientFruitQuest%%[#]Letter from Evelyn
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynAncientFruitQuest: ItemDelivery/Antique Recipe/Evelyn found a missing page from her grandmother's recipe book and needs an Ancient Fruit to recreate a legendary jam./Bring Evelyn 1 Ancient Fruit./Evelyn (O)454 1/-1/1500/-1/true/Oh, my stars! You really found one!#$b#I'm going to start preserving this right away. This means so much to me, dear.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeBatteryQuestLetter: This damned storm knocked out the power to my ham radio. I've got a scheduled check-in with an old friend of mine in Zuzu City, and I don't want him thinking I've finally kicked the bucket.^^Bring me a Battery Pack so I can get this hunk of junk working again.^^- George^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeBatteryQuest%%[#]Letter from George
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeBatteryQuest: ItemDelivery/Static Voices/A storm knocked out George's ham radio, and he needs a Battery Pack to power it back up to reach his old friend in Zuzu City./Bring George 1 Battery Pack./George (O)787 1/-1/350/-1/true/Hmph, took you a while. But it works.#$b#Now let me get back to the frequency. We'll talk later.$l
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynStarfruitQuestLett: I was speaking with the merchant at the cart, they told me about an exotic tea brewed from a bright yellow Starfruit. It sounded simply divine!^^If you're able to grow one of those on your farm, would you bring it over? I'll put the kettle on and we can share a pot together on the porch.^^- Evelyn^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynStarfruitQuest%%[#]Letter from Evelyn
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynStarfruitQuest: ItemDelivery/Starry Brew/Evelyn wants to make an exotic Stardrop tea recipe she learned from the Traveling Cart using a Starfruit./Bring Evelyn 1 Starfruit./Evelyn (O)268 1/-1/750/-1/true/What a magnificent shape! I can almost smell the sweetness already.#$b#I'll put the water on right now, dear.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgePrismaticShardQues: When Alex's mother, Clara, was younger, she used to sit by the window for hours looking for rainbows after the spring rain.^^The winter days are dark without her. Bring me a Prismatic Shard. Please... Please.^^- George^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgePrismaticShardQuest%%[#]Letter from George

ItemDelivery/Rainbow Rays/George wants a Prismatic Shard to catch the light on the windowsill, in memory of his late daughter./Bring George 1 Prismatic Shard./George (O)74 1/-1/1000/-1/true/It's... it's perfect.#$b#The colors are just as bright as I remember.#$b#Hmph.#$b#...#$b#Evelyn and I... we used to watch her sit by the window for hours, just staring at the rainbows.#$b#Thank you. Really.#$b#...#$b#...#$b#...I miss her every day, kid.#$b#Every single day.#$b#...#$b#...#$b#I need time... alone.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeCoffeeQuestLetter: Kid,^^My old joints are aching something terrible today. A hot cup of Coffee usually helps get my body working again.^^Bring me a cup, if you have the time.^^- George^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeCoffeeQuest%%[#]Letter from George
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeCoffeeQuest: ItemDelivery/Morning Coffee/George needs a cup of Coffee to help get his body working again./Bring George 1 Coffee./George (O)395 1/-1/200/-1/true/Ah... that hits the spot.#$b#Thanks. You're not so bad after all.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynSunflowerQuestLett: Hello dear,^^You know, a nice, happy Sunflower would really cheer up the living room!^^If you happen to grow any on your farm, could you bring one to an old lady?^^- Evelyn^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynSunflowerQuest%%[#]Letter from Evelyn
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynSunflowerQuest: ItemDelivery/Splash of Yellow/Evelyn would like a Sunflower to brighten up her living room./Bring Evelyn 1 Sunflower./Evelyn (O)421 1/-1/200/-1/true/Oh, what a beautiful, sunny flower! It smells delightful.#$b#Thank you so much for bringing this to me, dear.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynTheGoldenPumpkinQu: My dearest dear,^^I know this is a terribly strange request from an old lady, but please hear me out!^^Years and years ago, when I was a little girl, my grandmother kept a beautiful golden pumpkin on the porch. It shone like the sun every morning.^^I thought she was the luckiest woman in the world.^^If you ever happen to find or grow a Golden Pumpkin, would you bring it to me? I just... I would love to sit with it and remember her.^^All my love,^^- Evelyn^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynTheGoldenPumpkinQuest%%[#]Letter from Evelyn

ItemDelivery/Grandmother's Golden Table/Evelyn would love a Golden Pumpkin to remember her grandmother by./Bring Evelyn 1 Golden Pumpkin./Evelyn (O)373 1/-1/2500/-1/true/Oh, my heart!#$b#Just look at it sitting there...#$b#Thank you, dear. This means a lot to me.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeRabbitsFootQuestLe: Alex has been having some rough days lately. He doesn't say much, but I can tell. The kid works harder than anyone, and he still gets so down on himself sometimes.^^I'm not one for sentimental nonsense, but I heard a rabbit's foot is supposed to bring good luck. The real kind. The soft, fluffy kind.^^If you've got a rabbit on that farm of yours... well. Maybe a lucky charm wouldn't hurt.^^- George^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeRabbitsFootQuest%%[#]Letter from George
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeRabbitsFootQuest: ItemDelivery/Lucky Charm/George wants a Rabbit's Foot to secretly give to Alex as a good-luck charm./Bring George 1 Rabbit's Foot./George (O)446 1/-1/300/-1/true/...It's softer than I expected.#$b#Good. That's... that's good.#$b#The kid needs to catch a break. This'll help. Probably just nonsense, but...#$b#...Hmph. You didn't hear me say any of that.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeSlimeQuestLetter: My TV has been acting up, full of annoying static at night.^^I read in an old magazine that it could be caused by an overpopulation of Slimes in the local caves disrupting the magnetic field.^^Do me a favor and head into the mines to slay 5 of those things. I need some peace and quiet.^^- George^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeSlimeQuest%%[#]Letter from George
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeSlimeQuest: Monster/TV Static/George claims that the static on his television is being caused by too many Slimes in the mines./0 of 5 Green Slime defeated./Green_Slime 5 null false/-1/1000/-1/true
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynTapperQuestLetter: My dearest dear,^^George and I took a walk through the forest recently, and he remarked how much he missed the taste of fresh Maple Syrup.^^I'd love to tap a tree for him, but I'm afraid I don't have the strength to make the tool. Could you perhaps craft or find a Tapper and bring it to me?^^- Evelyn^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynTapperQuest%%[#]Letter from Evelyn
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynTapperQuest: ItemDelivery/Sweet Maple/Evelyn would like to collect Maple Syrup for George, but she needs a Tapper./Bring Evelyn 1 Tapper./Evelyn (BC)105 1/-1/500/-1/true/Oh, what a sturdy little machine! I can't wait to set this up.#$b#Thank you so much, dear.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeRadioactiveQuestLe: I don't care if you think I'm crazy. I was watching my late night programs and they said there's a glowing green radioactive metal that can permanently cure joint pain.^^If you ever manage to smelt a Radioactive Bar, bring it to me. I'm desperate.^^- George^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeRadioactiveQuest%%[#]Letter from George
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeRadioactiveQuest: ItemDelivery/Glowing Cure/George is desperate to cure his joint pain and wants a Radioactive Bar based on a late-night TV program./Bring George 1 Radioactive Bar./George (O)910 1/-1/7000/-1/true/It's... glowing.#$b#I hope this actually works.#$b#Thanks. You always come through.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynGemBerryQuestLette: I've baked nearly every recipe in this valley over the last sixty years. But there is one fruit I have never had the pleasure of tasting... a Sweet Gem Berry.^^I know they are incredibly rare and take a whole season to grow. But if you ever happen to harvest one on your farm, could you bring it to me? It would make my life complete.^^- Evelyn^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynGemBerryQuest%%[#]Letter from Evelyn
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynGemBerryQuest: ItemDelivery/The Rarest Berry/Evelyn has baked almost everything in the valley but wants to taste the rare Sweet Gem Berry./Bring Evelyn 1 Sweet Gem Berry./Evelyn (O)417 1/-1/3000/-1/true/Oh, my stars! It smells absolutely divine!#$b#I am going to savor every single bite of this.#$b#You have made an old woman's dream come true today. Thank you.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_MonaGraveQuest: Basic/Quiet Rest/Bring a Green Strange Doll to Mona's grave in town.../Interact with Mona's Gravestone/null/-1/-1/-1/true
LucyTheDove.PTE_MonaGraveQuestLetter: The rain is loud today.^^You found this letter tucked under your door. There is no return address. The handwriting is shaky, barely legible.^^"...Please. Bring the little green doll to her grave in the southeast of town. She never got to say goodbye.^^She's still there."^^%item quest LucyTheDove.PTE_MonaGraveQuest%%[#]Waterlogged Letter
LucyTheDove.PTE_MonaQuestCompletedLetter: A strange, waterlogged note arrived...^^"Thank you."^- M.[#]Waterlogged Note
LucyTheDove.PTE_MonaGraveEvent_Line1: You offer the Green Strange Doll to Mona's grave...
LucyTheDove.PTE_MonaGraveEvent_Line2: ...the graveyard feels a lot lighter. The restless spirit has moved on.
LucyTheDove.PTE_MonaGraveEvent_Line3: ...a freezing, waterlogged hand gently brushes against the back of your neck.
LucyTheDove.PTE_Evelyn6HeartEvent_Line1: Oh, @! Thanks for everything you do around town.#$b#It really means a lot to George and me.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_Evelyn6HeartEvent_Line2: You are always welcome here, dear.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_George6HeartWinterEvent_: Humph! What are you doing wandering around in the cold? You're tracking snow into the house.
I just wanted to see how you were doing.
I brought you some warm cider.
Hmph. I'm doing fine. But don't stand there shivering, stay inside where it's warm.
Humph... you're too kind for your own good. Pull up a chair and stay inside before you freeze.
Don't be dramatic. Since you're already here, just stay inside and warm up.

You know... Evelyn worries about you out there on that farm.#$b#And I suppose... if you froze solid out there, it'd be too quiet around here.$1#$b#Just shut up and watch the television with me, alright?
LucyTheDove.PTE_Evelyn8HeartPhotoEvent_L: Oh, @! Come here for a moment, dear.
...My old eyes aren't what they used to be.#$b#I found this photograph tucked away in the bookshelf, but I can't quite read the faded ink on the back.#$b#Could you tell me what it says?
LucyTheDove.PTE_Evelyn8HeartPhotoEvent_P: Read the back of the photograph:
LucyTheDove.PTE_Evelyn8HeartPhotoEvent_O: I can't read it either, the ink is too smudged.
LucyTheDove.PTE_Evelyn8HeartPhotoEvent_R: Ah... Forty years. That takes me back.
That's a shame. Time really does wash everything away, doesn't it?
LucyTheDove.PTE_Evelyn8HeartPhotoEvent_L: ...I heard you two. You don't need to read it. I know exactly what photo that is.
It's from the day after we got married. We took a trip down to the ocean... You were wearing that yellow sundress.
Hmph. Just because my legs gave out doesn't mean my brain went with 'em. I remember the important things.
Quiet down, you're embarrassing me in front of the kid.
Let's... let's just focus on the show.
LucyTheDove.PTE_EvelynGeorgeClaraMemoryE: Oh, @! Come in, dear. We were just doing a bit of spring cleaning.
Hmph. 'We' means Evelyn is dusting, and I'm watching to make sure she doesn't knock over the television.
Oh, hush, George... Look what I found in the bottom drawer, @.
It's a little pinwheel. Clara used to love carrying this around when the wind picked up in the valley.
The plastic red one?... Hmph. She used to blow on it until her face went blue.

She was such a spirited little girl. I can still hear her laughing when I close my eyes.#$b#@, do you ever find yourself holding onto little things like this... just to remember the people you've lost?
Yes. The little things are the most important.
Sometimes, but I try to look forward instead.
You have a beautiful soul, dear. The memories we keep are the greatest treasures we have left.
Hmph. Nothing wrong with looking forward. Can't spend your whole life living in the past.
...Alright, that's enough of this dusting nonsense. The dust is getting in my eyes.
Oh, George... your eyes are watering, aren't they?
I said it's the dust! Bah... Just put the pinwheel on the mantle. Let's watch the game.
*Chuckles* Alright, dear. It will sit right up there.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeAutumnAcheEvent_Li: ...Oh. It's you. Leave the door shut, the drafts are brutal today.#$b#And don't bother adjusting the television. I'm too tired to watch it anyway... just staring into space.
Evelyn's out. Trying to organize the festival stuff. She kept begging me to come along.#$b#I told her to pipe down and leave me be.

The truth is... she gets too emotional out there. Watching the other old-timers walk around, while she has to struggle pushing me through the dirt and leaves.#$b#I can see the pity in her eyes. I can't stand it.
Every time autumn hits, my joints start to burn. Reminds me exactly of the hospital bed thirty years ago.#$b#I went into the mines a whole man that fall, and came out like this.
I used to be the one taking care of her.#$b#Now I just sit here, turning into stone while the seasons change without me.#$b#...Don't just stand there staring at an old man, kid. It's pathetic.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeAutumnAcheEvent_Op: You aren't a burden to her, George.
The cold affects my farming work, too. I understand.
LucyTheDove.PTE_GeorgeAutumnAcheEvent_Re: Hmph... You talk easy.#$b#But... she hasn't left my side once in thirty years. I suppose that counts for something.#$b#Thanks for listening to an old fool's rattling.
Aye... the land doesn't care if your back hurts, does it? At least you can still fight through it.#$b#Keep moving while you still have the legs for it, kid.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Generic_Mo: I've been preparing lesson plans for Jas and Vincent. Sometimes it's difficult to keep their attention, but seeing them learn makes it all worth it.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Generic_Tu: I'm hoping to do some reading under a tree today, if I can find the time.#$e# It's so peaceful out by the river.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Generic_We: Mom has been... well, mom.$s#$e#I just need to keep things tidy around here. A clean space helps me think clearly.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Generic_Th: Have you found any interesting artifacts lately? I love reading about the history of the valley.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Generic_Fr: The weekends are almost here. I should try to get ahead on chores so I can relax a little.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Generic_Sa: It's nice to have a break from tutoring today.#$e#Maybe I'll cook something special for dinner.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Generic_Su: The valley is so quiet today... I like days like this.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Spring_Mon: The spring air is so refreshing! I really need it after spending so much time in the trailer.#$e#It gives me energy to teach!
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Spring_Wed: Spring is my favorite time of year. Seeing everything come back to life... it gives me hope.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Summer_Thu: It's so hot today. I worry about Mom, she doesn't do well in the heat.$s
I tried taking the kids to the beach today, but the water was a bit too rough.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Fall_Wedne: The fall leaves are beautiful, but they mean winter is coming.#$e#Our trailer isn't very well insulated...
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Fall_Satur: Sometimes I like to sit by the bridge and watch the leaves float down the river.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Winter_Sun: I've been trying to teach the kids about winter constellations, but it's too cold to stay outside for long.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Winter_Sat: A good book, a warm blanket, and a hot cup of tea. That's my perfect winter weekend.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Spring_1: Happy New Year! I have a feeling this year is going to be special.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Summer_1: Summer is officially here. I hope I can find some time to relax by the river.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Summer_Mon: The kids are extra restless today, it must be the summer heat.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Fall_Monda: I have so much grading to do today, I almost wish I could just sleep in instead.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Winter_Thu: It's so hard to wake up early when it's dark and freezing outside.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Rainy: I always worry about the roof of the trailer when it rains...$s
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Spring_12: Are you going to the Egg Festival tomorrow? I hear the hunt is very competitive.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Summer_10: The Luau is tomorrow! I wonder what everyone is bringing for the soup this year.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Fall_26: I've been preparing my costume for Spirit's Eve tomorrow. I hope the kids aren't too scared by the maze.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Winter_7: The Festival of Ice is tomorrow! I always bundle up, but I still end up freezing.#$e#It's worth it to see the ice sculptures, though.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Summer_Thu: You know, before we started talking, I always felt so lonely in Pelican Town.#$e#I'm really glad we're friends...$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Fall_Sat4: Sometimes I dream of leaving this valley and seeing the world... but then I think of Jas and Vincent. Who would teach them?$s
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Winter_Sat: I tried making tom kha soup yesterday. It's one of my favorites, but it never turns out exactly right...#$e#Maybe one day I'll get it perfect.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Spring_Fri: I saw Mom at the saloon again last night... it makes me sad. But... having a friend like you helps.$s
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Spring_Sat: It's nice outside. Sometimes I imagine us packing up a picnic and reading books in the secret woods.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Summer_Thu: You've really brought so much light to my life. I used to just read about adventures, now I feel like I'm having one.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Fall_Sun6: I've been trying to teach Vincent some basic math, but he keeps asking about you! You're quite popular with the kids.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Winter_Sat: I'm knitting a new sweater. It's so cold in the trailer during winter, we have to wear extra layers inside.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Spring_Thu: I love looking at all the wild spring flowers. I wish I could grow a garden, but there's just no space by our trailer.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Spring_Sun: Sunday is usually a quiet day for me. Just cleaning up and organizing my books for the week.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Fall_Thurs: Do you have any good books you've read recently? I feel like I've read everything in the Stardew Valley library twice.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Fall_Sunda: The autumn harvest is so important. I hope your farm is doing well. We all rely on it.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Spring_24: It's the Flower Dance! I always get a little nervous dancing in front of everyone.$s
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Summer_28: The Moonlight Jellies are so beautiful. Seeing them glowing in the water... it feels magical.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Fall_16: Have you set up your grange display yet? I'm excited to see what you brought.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Winter_25: The Feast of the Winter Star... it's a time for family. I guess mine is small, but I'm thankful for what I have.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Spring_Tue: I always look forward to Tuesdays in the spring. The valley feels so alive and clear.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Spring_Fri: The weekend is almost here. I should try to gather some wild spring onions if I have time.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Spring_Sat: I spend most of my Saturdays reading, but sometimes I just watch the clouds roll over the valley.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Spring_Wed: I read a book recently about a farmer who moved away from the city... it made me think of you.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Summer_Fri: I'm still getting used to speaking with you so often. It's... nice.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Fall_Fri2: Mom doesn't like the cold weather approaching... I try not to bother her when she's in a mood.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Fall_Sat6: You always seem to be working so hard. Don't forget to take a break and enjoy the autumn breeze.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Winter_Mon: The start of the week in winter is the hardest. But seeing you brightens my day.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Winter_Fri: It's so chilly today. Make sure you dress warmly on your farm!
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Spring_2: I hope this season brings some good changes for all of us.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Fall_1: Autumn is here... Time to get out the extra blankets.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Spring_10: The spring rain is so gentle. I love listening to it tapping on the roof while I read.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Fall_18: Jas made a cute little pile of red leaves today. Autumn is just so magical for the kids!$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Winter_10: Everything looks so peaceful covered in snow. Like a giant icing on a cake!$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Spring_10: Look at all these flowers poppin' up. Makes the walk to the saloon a little prettier, I guess.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Fall_18: The leaves are turnin' orange. Reminds me I need to pull out my thick winter coat soon.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Winter_10: Brrr! I saw a little robin shivering outside. I nearly left some breadcrumbs for it.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Generic_Mo: Starting the week off right with a good book. Have you read anything interesting?
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Generic_Tu: Do you ever wonder what it would be like to live out far away? I read they have very different customs.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Generic_We: Midweek already... time flies when you're busy teaching.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Generic_Th: I helped Jas with some crafts today. She's so creative!$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Generic_Fr: I'm looking forward to a quiet evening tonight. Just me and my thoughts.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Generic_Sa: Saturday is my favorite day to tidy up. It feels good to start the weekend with a clean space.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyDialogue_Generic_Su: Sunday mornings are meant for a slow cup of tea and a peaceful walk.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Spring_Monda: Ah, spring. My favorite part is the fresh parsnips. Make sure you grow plenty.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Spring_Tuesd: The valley's startin' to thaw out. Guess I should think about helpin' Penny with the spring cleanin'... not today, though.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Spring_Wedne: I caught Penny scrubbing the trailer from top to bottom again this morning. The girl works too hard.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Spring_Thurs: Gus was tellin' me about a new dish he's tryin' out. I just go for the drinks, honestly.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Spring_Frida: End of the week... well, it's all the same to me. As long as the Saloon is open.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Spring_Satur: Saturday mornin'. The trailer's always so noisy with the birds outside. Wish they'd keep it down.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Spring_Sunda: Sunday... a good day to do absolutely nothing. Wish Penny would take a break too, she works herself to the bone.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Summer_Monda: It's scorching today. Nothing hits the spot quite like a cold Pale Ale in this weather.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Summer_Sunda: Too hot to do anything today. The AC in this trailer is barely sputterin' out any cold air.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Fall_Monday: The cold air makes my joints ache. Gus better have the fireplace going tonight.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Rainy: Yoba, I hate when it rains. The trailer gets this... damp smell that just won't wash out.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Spring_14: Glad the Egg Festival is over. Standing around in the sun trying to be social ain't my idea of a good time.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Spring_20: You ever think about leaving the valley? Course not, you got a whole farm to run. Us regular folks don't have it so easy.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Summer_2: The heat is already startin' to bother me. Reminds me, need to tell Gus to stock up on the cold stuff.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Summer_12: Did you see what they put in the soup yesterday? Guess it turned out fine, but I prefer my liquids fermented.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Summer_27: Those glowing jellies are coming to the beach tomorrow. Suppose I'll drag myself down to see 'em, for Penny's sake.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Fall_2: Ah, Fall. Best part is it ain't hot anymore. And the Saloon starts servin' roasted chestnuts.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Fall_15: Setting up for the Stardew Valley Fair takes a lot out of a person. And I ain't even the one settin' it up.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Fall_28: Tomorrow's Winter. Tell you what, the cold is horrible for my joints, but at least folks aren't constantly buggin' me.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Winter_1: Winter's officially here. The trailer's draftier than a sieve. Gotta wear two layers just to sit on my own couch.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Winter_15: Middle of winter and nothing to do. The bus sits in the cold, I sit in the cold. Makes you thirsty, don't it?
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Winter_24: Feast of the Winter Star tomorrow. Yoba knows I don't have much to give, but Penny usually makes something nice for it.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Generic_Mond: Mondays used to mean something when I was driving the route every week. Now? It's just another day.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Generic_Tues: Got a headache today. Keep your voice down, okay?
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Generic_Wedn: Sometimes I look at my trailer and think... well, it ain't a palace, but it keeps the rain off my head.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Generic_Thur: Don't judge me just because I like to relax with a drink at the Saloon. Gus is a good listener.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Generic_Frid: Weekend's coming up. Might buy Penny a little something from the store if I have spare G's. Don't tell that.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Generic_Satu: Yoba gives us trials. It's up to us to push through 'em.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Generic_Sund: Sunday is a day of rest, so let me rest, alright?
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Spring_Wedne: I used to hate Wednesdays, but knowin' there are good folks like you in the valley makes it a bit better.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Summer_Monda: It's so hot today. You better stay hydrated if you're out workin' on that farm all day.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Fall_Friday6: Gus usually makes something hearty on Fridays in the fall. You should stop by the saloon tonight.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Winter_Frida: Ice on the roads, ice on the trailer. Winter's rough, but having a cold beer kinda numbs it.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Spring_5: Fifth of Spring already. Used to be I'd have the bus running like clockwork. Now I just sit around waitin' for Yoba to answer.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Spring_Thurs: My head is pounding. Do me a favor and talk quiet.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamDialogue_Spring_Frida: End of the week. Not that it matters when you're outta work.

LucyTheDove.PTE_PamRecipeEvent_1: Pam, I'm telling you, the folks in town would go crazy for it.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamRecipeEvent_2: No, Gus! A family recipe's a family recipe. You don't just hand it out to anyone who asks.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamRecipeEvent_3: But it's just cheese, potatoes, and... what was that secret ingredient again?
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamRecipeEvent_4: Hey! Don't you try to guess it! It's none of your business!
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamRecipeEvent_4b: Oh come on, Pam. Your grandmother would've wanted people to enjoy it.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamRecipeEvent_4c: Don't you bring her into this, Gus. I mean it.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamRecipeEvent_5: Oh, great. You heard all that, didn't ya, @? Well? You got somethin' to say too?
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamRecipeEvent_Question: What do you say to Pam?#Sharing it would make people happy.#You should be proud of your family's cooking!
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamRecipeEvent_Answer1: ...I guess that's true. Doesn't do much good just sittin' in my head.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamRecipeEvent_Answer2: Proud...? I... suppose so. We didn't have much growing up, but we always had this.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamRecipeEvent_Answer3: Just a recipe?! You don't know the first thing about it, kid!
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamRecipeEvent_6: Come on, Pam. Think of the joy it could bring to the valley. Good food connects people!
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamRecipeEvent_7: ...Fine. I guess. But you better not change a single thing about it, Gus. And you better name it after my grandmother!
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamRecipeEvent_8: I wouldn't dream of changing it, Pam. I'll get started right away!
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamRecipeEvent_9: Gus plates up a fresh portion of 'Nana's Cheesy Potato Casserole'. Pam smiles quietly to herself...
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamWillyPearlEvent_1: Wow, Willy... this seafood soup is absolutely delicious! Winning that community raffle was such a stroke of good luck.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamWillyPearlEvent_2: Har! Glad ye like it, Penny. Caught those crabs myself just this mornin' out past the lonely rock. Nothin' beats the sea's bounty when it's fresh.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamWillyPearlEvent_3: Outta the way! Willy! Look at this. I'm finally here to cash in big time!
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamWillyPearlEvent_4: Mom?! What are you doing here?$s
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamWillyPearlEvent_5: Look at that paper, fish-man! One genuine, sparkling pearl, courtesy of the old Joja regional sweepstakes. Hand it over — I've got a display case with its name on it!
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamWillyPearlEvent_5b: Hmm... Let me fetch me reading glasses...
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamWillyPearlEvent_6: Pam... I hate to break it to ye. But take a close look at the ink on the back here. This Joja voucher expired exactly ten years ago.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamWillyPearlEvent_7: What?! Ten years?! That's highway robbery! Those Joja corporate crooks never said a damn word to me about an expiration date!
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamWillyPearlEvent_8: Mom, please! Keep your voice down! Don't make a massive scene in Willy's shop... it's so embarrassing.$s
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamWillyPearlEvent_9: Har har! No worries, Penny. Don't sweat it. Joja's been shortchanging the folks of Pelican Town since before you were a toddler.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamWillyPearlEvent_10: Look, Mom... Willy gave me a really huge portion. There's plenty of soup here for both of us. Why don't you just sit down and share it with me?$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_PamWillyPearlEvent_11: ...Sigh. Well... I guess a bowl of free hot soup beats walking all the way back to the Saloon with empty pockets.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyPamDrinkArgument_1: Just one more can, it's all I need.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyPamDrinkArgument_2: Mom... please. You've already had three today. You said you were going to cut back.$a
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyPamDrinkArgument_3: And I will! Tomorrow. Stop hovering over me, Penny. I'm an adult.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyPamDrinkArgument_4: Well, start acting like one!$a#$b#I clean the trailer, I teach the kids, and I do all the shopping! You just sit there!$a
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyPamDrinkArgument_5: Don't you raise your voice at me, girl! I drove that bus for years to put food on the table!
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyPamDrinkArgument_6: And now...? Now I don't know if we'll even have enough to pay the lot fee next week!$s
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyPamDrinkArgument_7: Oh... @. I didn't see you come in.$s
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyPamDrinkArgument_8: Great. Now the whole town's gonna know our business.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyPamDrinkArgument_9: ...Look. I know I ain't the easiest mother to live with.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyPamDrinkArgument_10: But I do appreciate everything you do for us, Penny. I really do.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyPamDrinkArgument_12: Yeah. I know I mess up. A lot.#$b#I'll... I'll try to do better. For you.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyPamDrinkArgument_14: I will always be your mother... I'm proud of you.#$b#You are the best daughter I could ever have.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyPamDrinkArgument_15: You work so hard, and I don't say it enough, but I see it all. I really do.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyPamDrinkArgument_17: Alright, alright, that's enough sappiness for one night.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyPamDrinkArgument_18: Now... you got any more of those Pale Ales hidin' in the fridge? All this talking made my throat dry.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyPamDrinkArgument_20: Heh. Just kiddin', kid. Just kiddin'. I'm going to sleep.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyMuseumLesson_1: Ugh, Miss Penny, I'm bored! Learning about rusty old spoons is no fun.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyMuseumLesson_2: It's not a spoon, Vincent. It's an ancient dwarven artifact... It's very important for understanding our history.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyMuseumLesson_3: I think it looks like a hairbrush.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyMuseumLesson_5: Oh, hi @! Maybe you can help us!
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyMuseumLesson_6: Yeah! @, tell us a story about this rusty thing!
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyMuseumLesson_7: How would you explain the history of this artifact to the children?
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyMuseumLesson_8: How would you explain the history of this artifact?#It was used by an ancient hero.#It was used for digging up treasure.#It's just an old spoon.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyMuseumLesson_9: Wow... a real hero? That's so cool! Did they slay dragons with it?!
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyMuseumLesson_10: Well, maybe not dragons, but they definitely had grand adventures. See, Vincent? History can be an adventure.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyMuseumLesson_11: I wanna be an archaeologist now!
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyMuseumLesson_13: Well, let's just say it was very valuable to the people who found it.
LucyTheDove.PTE_PennyMuseumLesson_15: ...I guess we'll just move on to the next chapter then.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Mon2: The first day of the week...$s#$e#Mondays always carry a certain weight. I hope yours is going better than mine.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Mon4: Another Monday. I've found the best approach is to just accept them. Fighting it only makes things worse.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Mon6: I look forward to seeing you on Mondays, you know.#$b#It gives the start of the week some purpose.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Mon10: @...$l#$e#You have a habit of making even the most difficult mornings feel quite manageable.$l
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Tue2: Hello.$h#$b#A Tuesday, is it? They always catch me mid-thought.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Tue6: Tuesdays suit you, I think. There's a steadiness to you mid-week that I admire.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Tue8: I've been looking forward to seeing you today.$l I won't make it awkward by saying why. Just know that I have.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Tue10: You know, @, you've become something of a bright point in my week.$l I hope that doesn't embarrass you.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Wed2: Midweek already... Time moves strangely in this valley. I've been here long enough to notice.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Wed4: Good to see a familiar face on a Wednesday. The middle of the week can feel a bit stuck, don't you think?
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Spring_M: The gulls are loud this morning. Even nature seems to have something to say when spring arrives.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Spring_T: The tide has a certain restlessness to it in spring...$h#$b#Perhaps it carries something I've been searching for in my writing.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Spring_W: This spring air always has me reaching for my journal.#$b#I've already filled nearly two pages today. Most of it is nonsense, but promising nonsense.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Spring_T: Spring reminds me why I chose to live by the water. Everything wakes up at once... it's a lot to take in.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Spring_F: A good week deserves a quiet evening. I'm thinking of sitting on the porch and listening to the tide come in.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Spring_S: Spring Saturdays are when the town feels most alive.#$b#I enjoy watching it all from a respectful distance. The people here are quite... colorful.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Spring5: Five days into spring, and the valley is already transforming. I find myself filling pages I'd left entirely blank all winter.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Spring12: The middle of spring... Long evenings, good light, and a restless creative energy.$h#$b#My best lines always arrive uninvited.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Spring14: Halfway through spring already.$s Time passes so much faster when the world is beautiful. It almost feels unfair.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Mon8: You seem quite dedicated, @.#$b#I respect the discipline. It takes a particular kind of character to show up every morning, regardless of mood.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Tue4: I've been stuck on a passage for days.$s#$e#Some days the words come easily. Other days... not so much.$s
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Wed6: Midweek already. I find Wednesdays have a quiet quality to them. Caught between the start and end of things.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Wed10: @... you have a way of appearing just when the silence gets too heavy.$l#$e#It's appreciated.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Fri6: Friday already! I always treat myself to something fine from Gus on a Friday.$h#$b#Lobster, if the catch has been good. A small reward for a week's effort.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Sat10: Out of everyone you could visit today, you chose me.$l#$e#I find that genuinely moving, @.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Sun10: Sunday is meant for stillness, they say.$h#$e#But having you here makes it something more than that.$l
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Summer_M: Summer Mondays...$s The heat makes every hour feel twice as long, which I choose to interpret as extra writing time.
I was just stepping outside to let the sea breeze clear my head. Nothing like a warm wind off the ocean to reset your thinking.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Summer_T: Good light through the cabin window this morning.$h#$b#I've been at my desk since dawn. I think it's going well... I'm afraid to look back and check.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Summer_W: There's something about summer that makes poetry feel both excessive and necessary...$h#$b#And yet I keep writing it.
I've been drafting a passage set on this very beach.#$b#The irony of writing about a view I'm currently looking at is not entirely lost on me.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Summer_T: The heat is getting to me today.$s I'll wake early tomorrow and write before it gets too warm. That's usually my best work anyway.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Summer_F: Even a reclusive writer must acknowledge that Fridays in summer carry a certain atmosphere.
@!$h#$e#I was just turning something you said over in my mind. You have a particular talent for lodging ideas there.$l
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Summer_S: People pass the cabin all morning on summer Saturdays.#$b#I observe them discreetly, of course.#$b#They tend to find their way into my characters.
You've come on a summer Saturday.$l I'm genuinely glad.$h#$b#The season suits you, I think.
Sunday morning by the sea...$h#$b#If I were listing the best things in this valley, this scene would rank high.
These long summer evenings make me want to write something romantic.$l I wonder if anyone in particular is inspiring that impulse...
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Fall_Mon: A cool autumn Monday.$h#$b#My best weeks have always started this way. Something about the crisp air sharpens the mind.
@, you look well.#$b#The fall air agrees with you.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Fall_Tue: The ocean looks heavier in autumn, somehow.$s#$e#Or perhaps I'm projecting. I do that occasionally.
I've always thought autumn was the season of unfinished things.$s#$e#The year winds down before it's quite ready to let go of itself.
It's lovely to see you today.#$b#Fall makes the world feel smaller, more intimate. I mean that entirely as a compliment.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Fall_Wed: Writing in October feels different somehow. The words come out a bit darker, more careful. I enjoy the change.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Fall_Thu: The wind off the beach carries leaves now.#$b#An odd combination... sea salt and autumn.$h#$b#I've been trying to write a description of that particular smell for a week.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Fall_Fri: Slept in too late.$s The cabin feels stuffy now. I'll probably write better this afternoon once I've had some air.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Fall_Sat: Sometimes I see a man dressed in black going towards the ocean when it's raining.#$b#I thought I was imagining things until I saw him today at Pierre's buying hair gel.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Fall_Sun: Autumn Sundays have that bittersweet quality that I'm always reaching for in prose.$s#$b#Everything looks beautiful, but only because it's coming to an end.
Another autumn Sunday winding down.$h#$b#I'm grateful for the company today, @. Genuinely.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Fall12: A grey autumn day calls for more wood on the fire. And something to read that unsettles me a little...#$b#My best writing always starts that way.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Winter_M: The cold settled in quickly this year.$s#$e#Still, a winter morning by the sea has its own cold beauty. I try to appreciate it.
Another Monday. I've been managing to write in spite of the cold. Hot tea helps. Considerably more than I expected.
I hope winter isn't wearing on you too much.#$b#It's hard on most people, in my experience.
@...$l#$e#It's lovely that you still come to visit in this weather. Most sensible people stay indoors.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Winter_T: The quiet here is almost total in winter. Does that bother you? It used to unsettle me. Now I find I need it.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Winter_W: I've been spending a lot of time at the piano this week. Music comes easier than writing on the colder days.
The cabin feels smaller in winter.$s#$e#'Cozier' is probably the better word.$h#$b#Yes. I'll settle on cozier.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Winter_T: Thursday in the heart of winter is rough, if you look at it directly.$s Better to light a candle and read something comforting.
I've been meaning to ask, how do you manage the cold on the farm?$h#$b#It must demand a particular kind of toughness that I confess I don't possess.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Winter_F: A winter Friday. I'll treat myself to something warm from Gus tonight.$h#$b#A small ritual, but it's mine.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Winter_S: I've been cleaning today.$h#$b#I simply cannot write in clutter. It seeps into the prose and makes everything feel cluttered.
The snow off the beach doesn't fall the same way it does elsewhere in the valley.$h#$b#It spirals. Drifts. I've been watching it for an hour. Productively, I think.
I've made considerable progress this week, actually.$h#$b#Cold weather focuses me. Summer is magnificent, but it is full of distractions.
@, on a winter Saturday!$h#$e#You're made of stronger stuff than me, clearly.$l
A quiet winter Sunday.$h#$b#If you weren't here I'd likely be staring at the sea all afternoon and calling it research.
There's something about winter Sundays that feels very final.$s#$e#Like the week has run its course and just wants to be done.$h
Still visiting me, even in the coldest part of winter...$l#$e#That means quite a lot, @. I hope you know that.$l
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Winter14: The fourteenth...$s#$e#Half the season already gone.$h#$b#I've been thinking about how much can change in a year. It's a lot to take in.
LucyTheDove.PTE_ElliottDialogue_Winter24: Nearly the end of year.$h#$e#Another chapter closing.$s#$b#Though I suppose it's only a closing because a new one is about to begin.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Mon2: Start of a new week.$h#$b#The sea doesn't care much about Mondays, and I find that admirable.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Mon4: How are the crops comin' along?#$b#I always figured farming and fishing have more in common than people think. Both take patience.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Mon6: Good to see ya.$h#$b#I've been up since before dawn. The water's best in the early hours, before the world gets loud.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Mon8: You've become a familiar face around these docks.#$b#That's a good thing. This place suits ya.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Tue2: Not a bad morning.$h#$b#The sea was cooperative today. Can't ask for more than that.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Tue4: To take the life of a fish, you've got to respect it first.$h#$b#That's not just fishing wisdom. I think it applies to most things.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Tue6: The ol' Man was a fisherman.$h#$b#He used to say the sea teaches you everything worth knowing. Took me years to understand what he meant.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Tue8: I've been at this trade a long time.#$b#Some days it still manages to surprise me. That's why I keep at it.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Wed2: Midweek already.$h#$b#The docks have been busy.#$b#Good sign for the valley.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Wed4: Have I ever suggested you try using bait from the local area?#$b#The fish know what belongs in their water. Makes a difference.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Spring_Tue: Spring rain muddies up the rivers for a spell.$h#$b#But the catfish love it. Good time to cast upstream if you're after one.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Spring_Thu: The docks creak louder in spring.#$b#Wood expands with the warmth. I find the sound of it comfortable. Like the whole place is stretching out.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Spring_Sat: The beach picks up a bit now the weather's turned. More people near the water is a good thing. This coast deserves to be appreciated.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Mon10: You've been showin' up regular.$h#$b#Good habit to be in. And good company, I'll admit that much.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Tue10: Aye, another Tuesday. I've had some of my best catches on Tuesdays. Don't know why. The sea has its preferences.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Wed10: The sea doesn't care about days of the week.#$b#But I find I appreciate it a bit more when there's someone worth talkin' to.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Thu10: You're good company, @.$h#$b#Don't go spreading that around. Got a reputation to keep.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Thu2: Got a good knot in my line this morning. Took me a while to sort it out.#$b#Some days the sea tests your patience before you even get the hook in the water.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Thu4: There's a trick to mending a net that you only learn by ruining one first.#$b#My father ruined three. I managed with two. Reckon that counts as progress.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Thu6: You ever watch the tide go out and feel like it's taking something with it?$s#$b#Don't mind me. Just a Thursday kind of thought.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Sat2: Busy morning on the docks.#$b#Local folk, a few visitors. Good to see the water drawing people in.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Sun6: Sunday's the one day I let myself just... sit with it.#$b#The water, the quiet.$h#$b#Doesn't need anything from me. I appreciate that.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Fri10: Fisherman's work never really ends, but Fridays I give myself a bit of grace.$h#$b#Usually means one extra pipe and a longer look out at the water.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Sat10: You've become part of the fabric of this place, @. Pelican Town's lucky to have ya around.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Sun2: Sundays by the water are the finest thing I know. Come by any time. Don't need a reason.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Spring_Mon: The water's still got a bit of that winter chill to it.#$b#Best wear a thick coat if ye plan on anglin' today.
I sometimes wonder what the fish think when the ice finally melts away. It must feel like waking up from a long, cold dream.$e
I've been watchin' the tide come in today.#$b#It's a comforting rhythm, aye.
Me joints ache a bit less when the spring sun warms the docks.$h#$b#It's a good time to be alive, @.
If you ever need a quiet moment away from your crops, the sea is always here to listen.#$b#She's got a big heart, the sea.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Spring_Tue: I saw some fresh seaweed wash up this mornin'.#$b#Good for forage, that is.
Have ye tried fishin' down by the river?#$b#Sometimes the spring rains bring out the braver fish.
I nearly caught a lunker this mornin'.#$b#Snapped me line right in two!$h
You've got the steady hands of a natural-born angler, @. Ye do me proud.$h
Whenever the wind blows from the south in the spring, it carries the smell of the Fern Islands with it.#$b#Takes me back to me younger days.$s
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Spring_Wed: Spring storms can be fierce...#$b#But they leave the clearest skies behind 'em.
A lot of folks forget to respect the ocean when the weather gets nice.#$b#She's beautiful, but she commands respect.$e
Tying a good knot is just as important as knowing where to cast your line.$e#$b#A loose knot'll cost you the catch of a lifetime.
Y'know, some of the best catches I've ever had came when I wasn't tryin' to catch anything at all.#$b#Sometimes you just have to enjoy the quiet.
Between you and me, I've s't identify, just bring it to me.#$b#I've seen just about everything with fins.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Spring_Thu: I used to sail up and down the coast, tradin' and fishin'.#$b#But Pelican Town has a way of harborin' a man's heart. It's home, now.$h
You're lookin' well today.#$b#Farmin' must aeen some strange things in these waters. Shadows that don't belong to any fish I know.#$b#But the sea keeps her secrets, and I keep mine.
Gulls are awful loud today.#$b#Must be a school of herring nearby.
If ye ever catch something ye cangree with you.
If I ever retire, I think I'll still come down to these docks every morning.#$b#I don't think I could survive without smellin' the salt in the air.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Spring_Fri: Week's almost over for most folks, but a fisherman's schedule is set by the tides, not a calendar.$h
I was just thinkin' about tryin' an old family recipe for fish stew tonight.#$b#Nothin' warms the stomach quite like it.
I consider you one of me best crewmates, @. Even if we're technically commandin' different ships!$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Spring_Sat: Ah, the weekend.#$b#The valley gets a bit more lively, doesn't it?
You can learn a lot about a person by how they handle a tangled fishing line.$e#$b#Patience is a virtue, aye.
I saw Elliott earlier. Good lad.#$b#He enjoys the quiet of the beach just as much as I do.
Sometimes I wonder what it's like to live far inland, away from the coast.#$b#But then I look out at the waves, and I know I could never leave.$h
You've really turned that overgrown plot into a proper farm, haven't you?#$b#I knew you had it in you.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Spring_Sun: Sunday is a good day to mend the nets and clean the gear.#$b#A fisherman relies on his tools.
If the fish aren't bitin', sometimes it's best to just pack it in and enjoy the view.$h
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Summer_Mon: Hot start to the week.$h#$b#The fish get lazy in the heat. Makes 'em easier to catch if you know where they go to rest.
I was out before dawn.$h#$b#Best fishing happens before the heat sets in. Worth the early start.
The warm months go by fast.$h#$b#Before you know it fall's creepin' in. Best to enjoy the water while it's still kind.
Not often you get a breeze like this in summer.#$b#Makes the fishing easier when the surface isn't baking.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Summer_Tue: Summer's the time to go after the rare ones.$h#$b#Warm water draws 'em up. You just have to be patient enough to wait.
I've been out by the dock most of the evening.$h#$b#The summer air near the water has a particular smell. Salt and warmth. I never get tired of it.
Long days.$h#$b#Sun's up early and sets late. Good fishing hours if you make use of 'em.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Summer_Wed: Every summer I tell myself I'll take a proper day off.$s Never quite manage it. The sea's too generous to ignore.
Saw a pod of dolphins further out this morning.$h#$b#Haven't seen that since I was young. Good sign for the water quality.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Summer_Thu: Hotter than I'd like.$s#$b#Still, a slow day on the water beats a quick day anywhere else.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Summer_Fri: Summer Fridays I try to fish until it gets dark.$h#$b#The tide shifts around evenin'. Brings in something interesting more often than not.
The sea's been generous this week.$h#$b#Can't complain. Good fishing makes for a good man.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Summer_Sat: Made too much chowder last night.#$b#As usual.
A good week. The catches have been solid.#$b#No complaints from this old fisherman.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Summer_Sun: I find myself starin' out at the horizon on days like this.#$b#The water goes on longer than a person can properly imagine.
I've been fishing this stretch of coast more years than I can count.$h#$b#Still surprises me sometimes. That's the sea for you.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Summer_Tue: The air's thick today.#$b#Best stay in the shade when you can.
I saw the ocean glowing green last night.#$b#Just algae, nothing to worry about. But it sure is a sight.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Summer_Thu: Not much beats a summer evening on the docks.#$b#The breeze cools everything down.
You catching anything interesting lately?#$b#Warm water brings out different species.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Summer_Fri: The weekend's almost here.#$b#Not that the fish care about what day it is.
I thought about fixing up a new net today...#$b#But the heat got the better of me.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Summer_Sat: Tourists will be coming by the beach.#$b#Always good for business, but I miss the quiet sometimes.
The tide pools are full of life right now.#$b#Worth taking a look if you have the time.
LucyTheDove.PTE_WillyDialogue_Summer_Sun: I like to take it easy on Sundays.#$b#A slow day fishing is still a good day.
